questions.question: Where does the actual decryption of media files happen in the time-locked media system?
options: On-chain in the smart contract callback

questions.question: What does the _onBlocklockReceived callback store for media files?
In the frontend flow, users must upload the encrypted media to IPFS before submitting the transaction to the smart contract.
What is the key advantage of using time-locked media for product launches?
options: Press can download early but can't view until announcement time, preventing leaks
questions.correctAnswer: Press can download early but can't view until announcement time, preventing leaks

questions.question: The pattern for time-locked media is: commit now, reveal later, trust ______ not people.
In a dead man's switch scenario using time-locked media, how do you prevent the documents from auto-releasing?
options: Periodically update the target block to push it further into the future
questions.correctAnswer: Periodically update the target block to push it further into the future

questions.question: The blocklock encryption library cares whether it's encrypting text or video - it uses different functions for each.
